0:12.rendering: I set my heart to explore everything done under the sun, using wisdom as my guide — and I have learned this is a heavy burden God has laid on us all.
0:12.note: The Hebrew word for "sore travail" pictures a man straining under a load too heavy to carry alone, which is exactly the point — Solomon tried wisdom as his savior and found it exhausting, because only Jesus is strong enough to carry what we cannot.
